title: Souene
description: Explore new Glowing Mushroom Fields biome!
body:
GECKOLIB REQUIRED
Souene is a mod that adds new glowing (purpule) mushroom fields biome, unique mob and a few items.

Showcase: [https://youtu.be/sRM2tqRTl8w](https://youtu.be/sRM2tqRTl8w)

![Souene Entities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba8bfa23c27b93e502c58ff48c78d7bdf0d2fa7c.jpeg)


You can add this mod to your modpack.

NO FABRIC
